steps.title: Rewrite the radical as a fractional exponent
Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: \((xy)^{7/9}\) — exponent is inverted. Incorrect.
  • B: \((xy)^{9/7}\) — matches exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: \((xy)^{16}\) — 9+7=16 is the wrong operation; exponents multiply, not add. Incorrect.
  • D: \((xy)^{63}\) — 9×7=63 confuses the index with a multiplier. Incorrect.
